title: Change Main Column Name
excerpt:
Since a lot of the functionality I would like the ability to change the name of the first (Main ) Column on an existing board. 
It that is not possible defininf the name of that column when creating a Board from scratch …

posts.author: Topio (Javier Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since a lot of the functionality I would like the ability to change the name of the first (Main ) Column on an existing board.
It that is not possible defininf the name of that column when creating a Board from scratch would be very helpful

posts.author: golanholzer (golan holzer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey
you can click on “board settings” then “change item teminology”
then you have the option to change main column name.

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: This should include subitems - we should be able to edit subitem’s main column name.
